title: Ancient Artifacts 2
description: Unlock over 50+ artifacts with unique abilities and equip, craft, recycle and trade them! A result of over 2 years of work!
body:
## The trailer: ## Checkout belgie's video on my pack! [![Begie's video](http://theblackswitch.com/assets/images/ancient_artifacts/belgie_video.png)](https://youtu.be/oIpgs1NZSqU?t=285) --- ![The Logo](https://theblackswitch.com/assets/images/ancient_artifacts/header_image.png) ![My other projects:](https://theblackswitch.com/assets/images/ancient_artifacts/header/other_projects.png) ## Also Check Out my other projects at [theblackswitch.com](https://theblackswitch.com)!   ![Help out the project:](https://theblackswitch.com/assets/images/ancient_artifacts/header/support.png) ## Any small donation (even if it's 1$) really helps me out creating these projects! [coff.ee/theblackswitch](https://buymeacoffee.com/theblackswitch)   ![Pack Explanation:](https://theblackswitch.com/assets/images/ancient_artifacts/header/description.png) **Ancient Artifacts** is a minecraft datapack centered around, You've guessed it, artifacts! There are over 50+ artifacts each with their own levels and abilities! Those artifacts can be traded, crafted, recycled and even upgraded! **Check out our discord for any questions or chat with the developer!** [https://discord.gg/CTwEDA8kJb](https://discord.gg/CTwEDA8kJb) # 💍Artifacts Artifacts are special items which grant you special effects and abilities. Artifacts come with 1 - 5 levels, each carefully chosen with unique abilities. You can equip upto 2 artifacts at the same time. All artifacts also come with a rarity which determines how rare the artifacts is. You have `common` `uncommon` `rare` `unique` and `divine`.
Some artifacts and their abilities | Artifact | Name | Level I | Level II | Level III | Level IV | Level V | |----------|------|---------|----------|-----------|----------|---------| ||**Allies Amulet**|Regen I to all tamed mobs|Add Strength I|Add Speed I|Add Jumpboost I|All effects level II| ||**Final Shout Crown**|Explode + Instant Health I when your health drops below 3 hearts|Explode, Health and Absorbtion II|Explode, Health, absorbtion II and lightning bolts|

**/**

|

**/**

||**Combo Boots**|Allows you to perform a parry when using your shield right before taking damage|Parry + Slow down time when using a bow in the air| Parry + Bow slow + Smash downwards with a weapon when in the air|

**/**

|

**/**

||**Lifesteal Necklace**|5% of the damage dealt regenerates you|Upgrade to 10%|Upgrade to 15%|

**/**

|

**/**

||**Detecting borla**|Make ores glow within a 5x5 area around the player|Make ores glow within a 7x7 area around the player|

**/**

||Keep armor on death|Keep armor + hotbar on death|Keep armor + hotbar + artifacts on death|Keep everything on death (except xp)|

**/**

## Challenges Each artifact also comes with it's own challenge. These are advancements you can try to achieve to earn some more artifact loot! ![A gif showing examples of some challenges](https://theblackswitch.com/assets/images/ancient_artifacts/AA-challenges.webp) ## Obtaining To obtain artifacts you'll have to go and explore the world in the hopes of finding an overgrown structure. Every dimension has it's own set of structures to explore. There are over 40+ overgrown structures! **An overgrown jungle temple**: ![An image showing the overgrown jungle temple](https://theblackswitch.com/assets/images/ancient_artifacts/jungle_temple.webp) Once you've defeated all the mobs, you'll be able to locate an `artifact chest`. This special chest can only be opened using an `amethyst shard`. Once open, your loot will pop right out! If you're lucky you'll recieve an artifact! ![A gif showing the chest opening process](https://theblackswitch.com/assets/images/ancient_artifacts/AA-chest-open.webp) ## Upgrading When obtained, **artifacts** always **start from level one**. They have a varying amount of levels can be upgraded using an artifact upgrade . To upgrade an artifact, put the artifact in your offhand and use the upgrade, just like shown below. There's also a `heavy artifact upgrade` . This special item upgrades artifacts to their max level and it can even upgrade expensive artifacts! ![A gif showing the upgrading process](https://theblackswitch.com/assets/images/ancient_artifacts/AA-upgrading.webp) # ⚔️Bossfights The pack also adds 2 completely unique bossfights. They are carefully designed to give you the best experience possible! They both have custom music and an awesome bossbar! ![The sculk heart is a chamber found hidden undergournd in the deep dark. The heart is the controller of all sculk and can summon helpers to keep you away from it's treasures. Featuring custom music and an awesome bossbar.](https://theblackswitch.com/assets/images/ancient_artifacts/sculk_heart.webp) ![The Shulker King is a castle like structure found floating in the end void.](https://theblackswitch.com/assets/images/ancient_artifacts/shulker_king.webp) # 🧙Artifact Smith The `artifact smith` is a new villager which trades all sorts of usefull stuff. It has an `artifact cauldron` as it's job block You can trade your duplicate artifacts for emeralds and also buy some useful goodies like `artifact upgrades` , `artifact templates` , and `essence` . The Smith changes it's artifacts trades every day so you have the chance to get rid of that common artifact you have 5 duplicates of ;) As a final trade the smith has a `dungeon map` which leads you to the very end game and difficult `artifact dungeon`. ![An image of the artifact smith](https://theblackswitch.com/assets/images/ancient_artifacts/artifact_smith.webp) # 🛠️ Artifact Cauldron The `artifact cauldron` is a special block obtained by using an `artifact upgrade` on a normal cauldron. It can be used as a job block or used to craft 2 recipes. If you ever forget how the recipes work, no problem there is a gaint tooltip floating in front to tell you exactly what to do! ![The artifact cauldron and it's tooltip](https://theblackswitch.com/assets/images/ancient_artifacts/artifact_cauldron.webp) ## Artifact crafting Artifact crafting is one of the recipes the artifact cauldron can craft. It's a more mid to late game way of obtaining artifacts. Throughout your explorations you'll find parchments these parchments contain tips about what items are used to craft certain artifacts. These recipes are randomly generated for every world. ![3 Examples of some parchments and what they mean](https://theblackswitch.com/assets/images/ancient_artifacts/parchment.webp) With all that knowledge you can combine an `artifact template` with some `compounds` and the right `relic` in the `artifact cauldron`. And there you go, If you've used the right ingredients, you should have a new artifact now! ![A gif showing the crafting process](https://theblackswitch.com/assets/images/ancient_artifacts/AA-crafting.webp) ## Artifact Recycling Artifact recycling is another one of the recipes the artifact cauldron can craft. It's a very late game option and it allows you to get rid of all your duplicate artifacts! ### Destroying To start, you first have to go to the `artifact dungeon`, a very difficult rogue like dungeon, in order to retrieve the `artifact hammer`. ![An image of the artifact hammer](https://theblackswitch.com/assets/images/ancient_artifacts/ancient_hammer.webp) Using your `artifact hammer` you can destroy your artifacts which gives you `artifact blend` , maby an `artifact template` , maby the `relic` the artifact is made of or sometimes some `artifact essence` . ![A gif showing the destroying process](https://theblackswitch.com/assets/images/ancient_artifacts/AA-destroying.webp) ### Recycling In order to turn those items back into some loot, you have to use 3 blend. During the recipe, you can also add some `artifact essence` . These items are used to change the chance to get an artifact of a certain rarity. For example using `unique essence` will give you more chance to get a `unique artifact`. ![A gif showing the recycling process](https://theblackswitch.com/assets/images/ancient_artifacts/AA-recycling.webp) ![Configs:](https://theblackswitch.com/assets/images/ancient_artifacts/header/configs.png) This pack also adds some configs which can be opened using `/trigger ancient_artifacts_config`. There are currently 2 settings but there will be more soon! ![Frequently Asked Questions:](https://theblackswitch.com/assets/images/ancient_artifacts/header/faq.png) **Q: Can I use this pack in my modpack?**
A: Yes ofcorse! Can you please credit me and link this page, it's really difficult to share datapacks :) **Q: Can you update this pack for version X?**
A: I'm trying my best to update the pack to the newest versions, backports are not possible. **Q: I have a suggestion / bug what do I do?**
A: Ooh nice thank you for your collab to the project, you can report bugs and suggestions on my github! ![Installation:](https://theblackswitch.com/assets/images/ancient_artifacts/header/installation.png) ### You basically have 2 options: **Download the mod version:** You need any of the supported mod loaders for this: 1. dowload the file 2. put it in your mods folder 3. If you're on a server, you have to put it in the server's mods aswell as in the client's mods folder! **Download the datapack version:** There is no need of any software, it runs on just vanilla (**NOT PAPER!!**) and if you're on a server, your players don't need to install it. 1. download the datapack version 2. put it in you datapacks folder of your world: `saves//datapacks/` 3. download the resourcepack 4. Put it in your resourcepack folder: `.minecraft/resourcepacks` **If you're the server owner, you can put the resourcepack on the server and enable it as required, this will automatically install the resourcepack on your player's clients** ![License](https://theblackswitch.com/assets/images/ancient_artifacts/header/license.png) * * * Ancient Artifacts © 2025 by theblackswitch is licensed under [CC-BY-NC-ND 4.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-nd/4.0/deed.en) An exception is made for video content, which can be monetized. However, video creators must give appropriate credit by leaving a link to this page in the video. **Additional condition**: The content of this work, as a whole or in parts, may not be used for training, fine-tuning, or enhancement of artificial intelligence systems, machine learning models or similar technologies. This includes for commercial, non-commercial, educational, research, or personal projects. * * *
![Credits:](https://theblackswitch.com/assets/images/ancient_artifacts/header/credits.png) # The datapack - theblackswitch - Project lead - theblackswitch - Project Ideas - theblackswitch - Textures - theblackswitch - Code - theblackswitch, Bidoof_Oofington, TheDarkGlue - Some help with Structure Building - theblackswitch, Bidoof_Oofington, Flor_4, TheDarkGlue, Shelfhead, Gertje - playtesters - Bidoof_Oofington, Flor_4, Shelfhead - Motivating me - HeDeAnTheonlyone/Taglib - useful tags - ESN Productions/Free Horror Ambience (Dark Project) - the dungeon ambient sound - HalbFettKaese/common-shaders - for help with shaders - AmberWat/NegativeSpaceFont - for custom font stuff - misode.github.io - for generating large json files - mcstacker.net - for generating large commands - CheburKot - prior explorer skeleton floor model inspiration - Infrared Scale/RedStone128 The Final Battle (8-bit Epic) - sculk heart boss music - Naku|enhanced-boss-bars - inspiration for the custom bossbars - Midnight Danger/The Last day - The shulker king boss battle music
